title: endlicheria citriodora
intro: Endlicheria citriodora, also known as Lemon Sassafras, is a plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae, native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Endlicheria citriodora include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Endlicheria citriodora can be made into tea, essential oil, or tincture, and are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
